title.ko: 절단; 구멍뚫기, 펀칭, 잘라내기, 형빼기 또는 절삭을 위한 기계에 공통된 세부(천을 잘라서 조각을 내는 칼 또는 다른 절개수단 또는 찢음부에 의한 해체 B02C 18/00; 유체 분사에 의한 절단 B24C 5/02; 휴대절단 공구 B26B; )
title.en: CUTTING; DETAILS COMMON TO MACHINES FOR PERFORATING, PUNCHING, CUTTING-OUT, STAMPING-OUT OR SEVERING (disintegrating by knives or other cutting or tearing members which chop material into fragments B02C0018000000;cutting by abrasive fluid jets B24C0005020000;hand-held cutting tools B26B)

definition.ko: 절단날부 또는 절단가공의 종류에 특징이 있는 절단 B26D1/00, B26D3/00 조작 및 제어장치; 절단장치의 세부 B26D5/00; 7/00 조합장치 B26D9/00, B26D11/00

title.ko: 절단날부의 종류 또는 동작에 의해서 특정지워진 피가공재의 절단; 그를 위한 장치 기계; 그를 위한 절단날부
title.en: Cutting through work characterised by the nature or movement of the cutting member; Apparatus or machines therefor; Cutting members therefor

title.ko: 피가공재와 함께 이동하지 않은 절단날부를 구비하는 것
title.en: involving a cutting member which does not travel with the work

title.ko: 고정 절단날부를 가지고 있는 것(B26D 1/547이 우선)
title.en: having a stationary cutting member (B26D0001547000 takes precedence)
with a plurality of cutting members

title.ko: 직선상으로 움직일 수 있는 절단날부를 가지고 있는 것(B26D 1/46, B26D 1/547이 우선)
title.en: having a linearly-movable cutting member (B26D0001460000, B26D0001547000 take precedence)
wherein the cutting member reciprocates
of the guillotine type
with a plurality of cutting members
in, or substantially in, a direction parallel to the cutting edge
with a plurality of cutting members

title.ko: 축 주위를 움직이는 절단날부가 있는 것(B26D 1/547 우선)
title.en: having a cutting member moving about an axis (B26D0001547000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 원형 절단날부가 있는 것, 예. 원판 칼날
title.en: with a circular cutting member, e.g. disc cutter

title.ko: 고정축의 주위를 회전하는 것(B26D 1/20~ B26D 1/24가 우선)
title.en: rotating about a stationary axis (B26D0001200000-B26D0001240000 take precedence)
with horizontal cutting member
with vertical cutting member
with inclined cutting member

title.ko: 움직이는 축의 주위를 회전하는 것(B26D 1/20~ B26D 1/24가 우선)
title.en: rotating about a movable axis (B26D0001200000-B26D0001240000 take precedence)
mounted on a movable arm or the like
mounted on a movable carriage
coacting with a fixed member

title.ko: 가동 부재와 협동하는 것, 예. 롤러(B26D 1/24가 우선)
title.en: coacting with a movable member, e.g. a roller (B26D0001240000 takes precedence)
coacting with another disc cutter
with a non-circular cutting member
moving about an axis substantially perpendicular to the line of cut
and rotating continuously in one direction during cutting
with cutting member mounted in the plane of a rotating disc, e.g. for slicing beans
with limited pivotal movement to effect cut
moving about an axis parallel to the line of cut
and rotating continuously in one direction during cutting, e.g. mounted on a rotary cylinder
and coacting with a fixed blade or other fixed member
and coacting with a rotary member
and slidably mounted in a rotary member
moving about another axis, e.g. mounted on the surface of a cone or curved body
having a cup or like cutting member
having a cutting member the movement of which is not covered by any preceding group
having an endless band-knife or the like
with tensioning means
with a plurality of band-knives or the like
having adjustable spacing between knives
Guides for band-knives or the like

title.ko: 와이어형 절단날부가 있는 것(무단 와이어 B26D 1/46; 가열 와이어를 사용한 절단 B26F 3/12)
title.en: having a wire-like cutting member (endless wire B26D0001460000;severing using a heated wire B26F0003120000)
with a plurality of wire-like cutting members
involving a cutting member which travels with the work, i.e. flying cutter
and is mounted on a movable arm or the like
and is mounted on a movable carriage
and is rotating about an axis parallel to the line of cut, e.g. mounted on a rotary cylinder

title.ko: 절단 가공의 종류에 따라서 특징지워진 절단 작업; 그를 위한 장치
title.en: Cutting work characterised by the nature of the cut made; Apparatus therefor
Bevelling
Grooving involving removal of material from the surface of the work
Making a superficial cut in the surface of the work without removal of material, e.g. scoring, incising

title.ko: 단일 직선형 이외의 절단 가공(잘라뽑기 또는 형빼기 B26F 1/38)
title.en: Making cuts of other than simple rectilinear form (cutting-out or stamping-out B26F0001380000)
to obtain pieces of spiral or helical form
Slitting marginal portions of the work, i.e. forming cuts, without removal of material, at an angle, e.g. a right angle, to the edge of the work
Forming notches in marginal portion of work by cutting
Cutting rods or tubes transversely
to obtain cubes or the like
using reciprocating knives
using rotating knives
to obtain segments other than slices, e.g. cutting pies
specially adapted for cutting fruit or vegetables, e.g. for onions

title.ko: 피가공물을 층상으로 분할하는 것; 절단에 의해서 층상물로 상호 분리하는 것(B26D 3/30 우선)
title.en: Splitting layers from work; Mutually separating layers by cutting (B26D0003300000 takes precedence)
Halving devices, e.g. for halving buns

title.ko: 절단, 잘라 뽑기, 형 뽑기, 펀칭, 구멍 뚫기 또는 절단날 이외의 수단에 의한 절단 장치의 조작 및 제어 장치
title.en: Arrangements for operating and controlling machines or devices for cutting, cutting-out, stamping-out, punching, perforating, or severing by means other than cutting
Means for moving the cutting member into its operative position for cutting
by fluid pressure
by electrical means

title.ko: 효과적인 절단을 위해 커팅부재를 작동시키는 수단
title.en: Means for actuating the cutting member to effect the cut
Hand or foot actuated means
Fluid-pressure means
Crank and pin means
Cam means

title.ko: 토글-링크식(B26D 5/10~ B26D 5/16이 우선)
title.en: Toggle-link means (B26D0005100000-B26D0005160000 take precedence)
with interrelated action between the cutting member and work feed
having the cutting member and work feed mechanically connected
including a metering device
wherein control means on the work feed means renders the cutting member operative
the control means being responsive to presence or absence of work
having the cutting member controlled by scanning a record carrier
with the record carrier formed by the work itself
scanning being effected by a photosensitive device
scanning being effected by magnetic means
with means operable by the moving work to initiate the cutting action
including a metering device
with interrelated action between work feed and clamp

title.ko: 절단, 잘라 뽑기, 형빼기, 펀칭, 구멍 뚫기 또는 절단날 이외의 수단에 의한 절단 장치의 세부
title.en: Details of apparatus for cutting, cutting-out, stamping-out, punching, perforating, or severing by means other than cutting
Means for holding or positioning work
with clamping means
providing adjustable clamping pressure
Arrangements for feeding or delivering work of other than sheet, web, or filamentary form

title.ko: 절단을 쉽게 하기 위한 재료 및 날부 처리 장치(긴장된 밴드커터 B26D 1/48)
title.en: Means for treating work or cutting member to facilitate cutting (tensioning band cutters B26D0001480000)

title.ko: 가열에 의한 것(가열수단를 구비한 것 B26F 3/08)
title.en: by heating (severing with heated members B26F0003080000)
by sharpening the cutting member
by tensioning the work
Means for removing cut-out material or waste
Cutting beds
Safety devices specially adapted for cutting machines
arranged to disable the operating means for the cutting member
Means for mounting or adjusting the cutting member; Means for adjusting the stroke of the cutting member

title.ko: 절단과 결합한 다른 조작을 하기 위한 수단(B26D 9/00이 우선)
title.en: Means for performing other operations combined with cutting (B26D0009000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 절단 횟수의 계산 또는 절단 길이의 측정을 하기 위한 것(B26D 5/24, B26D 5/40이 우선)
title.en: for counting the number of cuts or measuring cut lengths (B26D0005240000, B26D0005400000 take precedence)
for weighing cut product

title.ko: 제품을 반송하고 또는 쌓아 포개기 위한 것(성형품 또는 폐물을 제거하는 수단 B26D 7/18)
title.en: for conveying or stacking cut product (means for removing cut-out material or waste B26D0007180000)
for applying a coating, such as butter, to cut product
Cutting apparatus combined with punching or perforating apparatus or with dissimilar cutting apparatus
Combinations of several similar cutting apparatus
